title: Eric Weinstein Furious By Possible Hidden Physics
summary: A brief excerpt from an interview where Eric Weinstein expresses frustration about claims of hidden or advanced physics potentially being siloed, discussing concepts like neutrinos, new forces, entanglement, and the idea that advanced science could be indistinguishable from magic.

key_claims.claim: Advanced science could be indistinguishable from magic
Certain advanced scientific knowledge may be held by particular silos over other silos
